title: Land Of Ostra
description: Land Of Ostra Is a modpack made for travel, Adventure And combat. Those of who that do not respect the world of Ostra Will be Cursed by a unknown entity that joins...
body:
# The Land Of OSTRA. 
This is a modpack for those whom enjoy the following: Adventure, Farming and Combat. You can also upload this to any server that supports fabric loading. Although be careful not to awaken the entity as there is a very dangerous out of control entity. His name I cannot tell you as it is classified. You must play to find out...

## A Heads Up 
We may be deleting the herobrine mod as it gets rid of the natural chill vibe of the server as this modpack was intented to be a chill place that people could hop on a server and just chill with other people and create cool inventions.
